author: lOrm
content: Fixed: edit.rs now honours replace_all=true by calling content.replace() instead of replacen(_,_,1); when replace_all is false/absent the existing single-occurrence-with-multi-rejection error path is preserved (and now mentions the replace_all escape hatch in the remediation hint). Diff stats are scaled by occurrence count. Function refactored (canonicalise_edit_path + format_edit_success helpers) to stay under clippy too_many_lines budget — no #[allow]. 4 new fix687_* tests pass; 1412 baseline → 1428 passing.
